title: pancratium pedale
intro: Pancratium pedale, commonly known as the Sea Lily or Lycoris, is a bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its showy, bell-shaped flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pancratium pedale include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antitumor activity, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
